coherence_checks: Same-tag consistency: 'non-attachment-to-praise', 'team-culture', 'operator-system-coupling' — share two tags with 2.34. The tag set is consistent and the doctrinal claim across these tags is coherent: reputation-as-signal is structural, not vanity.
Cross-reference resolution: Chapter 5 (right-renunciation) and 18.66 (closing release) referenced for the compromised-peer-network case. Both pointers correct.

Cross-reference support: the citing claim (the verse names structural peer-network model update; this presupposes peers' judgment is itself substantive) is supported by Chapter 5's discussion of when withdrawal is warranted.
Consistency with 2.34: 2.34 named imperishable disrepute among all beings; 2.35 sharpens to competent peers. The two verses cohere as broad-then-narrow.
verdict_reason: Doctrine coherent across tags and cross-references. PASS on both 6.1 and 6.5.
